query:
SELECT id, user_id, university, major, FROM_UNIXTIME(FLOOR(id/1000000)) as match_time
FROM project_matches 
WHERE university LIKE '%Stanford%' OR university LIKE '%Yale%'
ORDER BY id DESC 
LIMIT 10;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2w6DdBww2bzwyZZ.root --database hB2F5YxeXakQRcL5WU36Vw --execute SELECT id, user_id, university, major, FROM_UNIXTIME(FLOOR(id/1000000)) as match_time
FROM project_matches 
WHERE university LIKE '%Stanford%' OR university LIKE '%Yale%'
ORDER BY id DESC 
LIMIT 10;
